project_type: Next.js 15 App Router frontend with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and Three.js
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build - must pass with no errors. 2. Run npm run lint - must pass.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. DO NOT modify: backend/, mcp-servers/, shared/, hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, components/Providers.tsx, components/entity/, app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts. Frontend-only changes. Stay on branch feat/premium-ui-rebuild.
contribution_requirements: Commit with clear messages. npm run build must pass. npm run lint must pass.
key_patterns: CSS variables in globals.css for theming (--bg, --surface, --text-primary, etc.). Components use var(--xxx) for colors. Tailwind classes reference custom gray/accent/success/warning/danger color scales. UI primitives in components/ui/ (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal, Toggle, Skeleton, EmptyState, Tabs, Tooltip). Layout in components/layout/ (Sidebar, TopBar, AppShell). Framer Motion for all animations. lucide-react for icons (strokeWidth 1.7 currently). All pages are client components with 'use client'. useSession for auth. API functions from lib/api.ts take accessToken param.
directory_structure: frontend/app/ - pages (dashboard/, onboarding/, landing). frontend/components/ui/ - primitives. frontend/components/layout/ - shell. frontend/components/chat/ - AI chat panel. frontend/components/voice/ - voice mode. frontend/lib/ - API helpers (DO NOT MODIFY). frontend/hooks/ - chat socket (DO NOT MODIFY).
